actions.label: Start operator session
actions.description: Runs the local operator startup summary and health checks.

actions.label: Run doctor diagnostics
actions.description: Runs the Sentinel diagnostic summary without deploying or sending anything.

actions.label: Refresh Sentinel state
actions.description: Generates the current persisted operational state summary.

actions.label: Generate daily report
actions.description: Generates Matthew's private daily operator report.

actions.label: Generate stakeholder report
actions.description: Generates the stakeholder-safe weekly progress report.

actions.label: Check platform health
actions.description: Checks tenant config, DB readiness, QA totals and runtime safety policy.

actions.label: Show DB status
actions.description: Prints platform persistence counts and latest DB summaries.

actions.label: Preview state API
actions.description: Prints a compact read-only API-style state preview from SQLite.

actions.label: Run SEO monitor
actions.description: Runs the SEO monitor and confirms current QA health.

actions.label: Generate roadmap intelligence
actions.description: Generates Sentinel's local improvement roadmap from feedback and operational state.

actions.label: Generate feedback backlog
actions.description: Generates the local operator feedback backlog report.

actions.label: Prepare stakeholder notification
actions.description: Generates stakeholder-safe notification payloads without sending messages.
